description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a minimalist rectangular design, featuring clean lines and a combination of white and dark exterior surfaces. The structure includes a rooftop garden with solar panels, a spacious patio, and a swimming pool along one side. Large floor-to-ceiling windows dominate the main living area, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The house sits on a raised platform with a tiled driveway and landscaped green areas. The entryway is understated, with a simple path leading to a recessed door. The overall aesthetic emphasizes sustainability, openness, and contemporary urban living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a rooftop garden, solar panels, large windows, and a swimming pool, featuring minimalist design and clean lines.
description_view_0: Side view showing the swimming pool, rooftop garden, solar panels, and a mix of white and dark exterior surfaces.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entryway, tiled driveway, and the full width of the rooftop garden and solar panels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the white wall, rooftop garden, and the pool area at the back.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the large glass windows, pool, and the extended patio area.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with a simple tiled path, no porch or columns, minimalistic and integrated into the facade
